title: Israel passes law to allow death penalty and public trials for those linked to 7 October
summary_full: Israel passes a law that permits the death penalty and public trials for those involved in the unprecedented Hamas-led attacks.
summary_public: Israel passes a law that permits the death penalty and public trials for those involved in the unprecedented Hamas-led attacks.

IL.label: negative
